answers.detail: All administrative and remote access to production systems requires multi-factor authentication.
answers.evidence: Acme Corp Information Security Policy v3.1 §2

answers.detail: User access rights are reviewed quarterly by system owners; access is revoked within 24 hours of termination.
answers.evidence: Acme Corp Information Security Policy v3.1 §2

answers.detail: Data transmitted over public networks is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.
answers.evidence: Acme Corp Information Security Policy v3.1 §4

answers.detail: Customer data at rest is encrypted using AES-256.
answers.evidence: Acme Corp Information Security Policy v3.1 §4

answers.detail: Formal recovery time objectives are not yet defined; they are being established and are targeted for the next policy revision.
answers.evidence: Acme Corp Information Security Policy v3.1 §7
